Sub'SQL_Reorg_16.2.138'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'MDFeAveSts') ALTER TABLE [MDFe] ADD [MDFeAveSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod If MDFeAveProt <> '' MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada Else MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.dIgitando EndIf
EndFor
EndSub

&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Aniversariantes') CREATE TABLE [Aniversariantes] ([EmpCod] int NOT NULL , [AnvCod] int NOT NULL , [AnvNom] varchar(100) NULL , [AnvTip] varchar(1) NULL , [AnvTod] varchar(1) NULL , [AnvUsuCod] int NULL , [AnvObs] varchar(350) NULL , [AnvDia] smallint NULL , [AnvMes] smallint NULL , [AnvDtaNas] datetime NULL , [AnvID1] int NULL , [AnvID2] int NULL , [AnvEml] varchar(100) NULL , [AnvTel] char(20) NULL, [AnvDtaOrd] varchar(4) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY([EmpCod], [AnvCod])) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Indexes where name = 'UANIVERSARIANTES') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [UANIVERSARIANTES] ON [Aniversariantes] ([EmpCod] ,[AnvDtaOrd] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = '' &Mensagem = 'Atualizando cadastro clientes. Aniversariantes' Do 'RodaScript'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod &PesRaz = PesRaz &PesPrmEml = PesPrmEml &PesPrmFon = PesPrmFon prcAtualizaAniversariantes.Call('ADD', EmpCod, &PesRaz, TipoAniversario.Pessoa, Status_SimNao.Sim, 0, '', PesDtaNas, PesCod, 0, &PesPrmfon, &PesPrmEml)
//FONES For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesFonCod Where not PesFonDtaNas.IsEmpty() and not PesFonDtaNas.IsNull() where Not PesFonCon.IsEmpty() and not PesFonCon.IsNull()
&AuxPesRaz = Substr(&PesRaz, 1, 15) + ' [FONE:'+ PesFonCon.Trim() +']'
prcAtualizaAniversariantes.Call('ADD', EmpCod, &AuxPesRaz, TipoAniversario.Fone, Status_SimNao.Sim, 0, '', PesFonDtaNas, PesCod, PesFonCod, PesFonNum, '') EndFor
//EMAILS For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesEmlCod Where not PesEmlDtaNas.IsEmpty() and not PesEmlDtaNas.IsNull() where Not PesEmlCon.IsEmpty() and not PesEmlCon.IsNull()
&AuxPesRaz = Substr(&PesRaz, 1, 15) + ' [EMAIL:'+ PesEmlCon.Trim() +']'
prcAtualizaAniversariantes.Call('ADD', EmpCod, &AuxPesRaz, TipoAniversario.Email, Status_SimNao.Sim, 0, '', PesEmlDtaNas, PesCod, PesEmlCod, '', PesEml) EndFor
//HERDEIRO For Each Order EmpCod, PesHerCod Where not PesHerDtaNas.IsEmpty() and not PesHerDtaNas.IsNull() where Not PesHerNom.IsEmpty() and not PesHerNom.IsNull()
&AuxPesRaz = Substr(&PesRaz, 1, 15) + ' [FILHO:'+ PesHerNom.Trim() +']'
prcAtualizaAniversariantes.Call('ADD', EmpCod, &AuxPesRaz, TipoAniversario.Filho, Status_SimNao.Sim, 0, '', PesHerDtaNas, PesCod, PesHerCod, &PesPrmfon, &PesPrmEml) EndFor
//SOCIO For Each Order EmpCod, PesSocCod Where not PesSocDtaNas.IsEmpty() and not PesSocDtaNas.IsNull() where Not PesSocNom.IsEmpty() and not PesSocNom.IsNull()
&AuxPesRaz = Substr(&PesRaz, 1, 15) + ' [SOCIO:'+ PesSocNom.Trim() +']'
prcAtualizaAniversariantes.Call('ADD', EmpCod, &AuxPesRaz, TipoAniversario.Socio, Status_SimNao.Sim, 0, '', PesSocDtaNas, PesCod, PesSocCod, &PesPrmfon, &PesPrmEml) EndFor EndFor EndSub

&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreFunCodVal') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreFunCodVal] int NULL " Do 'RodaScript'

&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedTmpPesCod') ALTER TABLE [PedidoTemporariaDuplicata] ADD [PedTmpPesCod] int NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpProBar') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] ADD [tmpProBar] VARCHAR(18) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpProQtdCmpEmb') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] ADD [tmpProQtdCmpEmb] MONEY NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where (not PesFunAgeBan.IsEmpty() and not PesFunAgeBan.IsNull()) and (not PesFunConBan.IsEmpty() and not PesFunConBan.IsNull())
&sdtContasBancarias.Clear() &sdtContasBancariasItem = new() &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConCod = 1 &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConBanCod = PesFunBanCod &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConAge = PesFunAgeBan &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConTpo = PesFunCcCp &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesCon = PesFunConBan &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConFav = PesFunFav &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConIsSel = true &sdtContasBancariasItem.PesConSts = Status_SimNao.Sim &sdtContasBancarias.Add(&sdtContasBancariasItem)
GravaCliente_ContasBancarias.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, &sdtContasBancarias)
PesFunBanCod.SetEmpty() PesFunAgeBan.SetEmpty() PesFunCcCp.SetEmpty() PesFunConBan.SetEmpty() PesFunFav.SetEmpty()
commit EndFor EndSub

sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.77' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmbCodNom') ALTER TABLE [Embalagem] ADD [EmbCodNom] varchar(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "UPDATE [Embalagem] SET [EmbCodNom]=T.[EmbCodNom] FROM (SELECT [EmpCod], [EmbCod], RTRIM(LTRIM(CONVERT( char(8), CAST([EmbCod] AS decimal(8,0))))) + ' - ' + RTRIM(LTRIM(COALESCE( [EmbNom], ''))) AS EmbCodNom FROM [Embalagem]) T WHERE [Embalagem].EmpCod= T.EmpCod AND [Embalagem].EmbCod= T.EmbCod " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub

Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCmp, in:&IsWeb, in:&IsRetorna, in:&Progressini, in:&ProgressFin, in:&Percentual);
